hotels.description_en:
Beachfront Location: El Hotelito Perdido in Rio Dulce offers direct beachfront access with stunning garden views. Guests can relax on the sun terrace or hot spring bath, enjoy the open-air bath, and take a dip in the swimming pool.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature parquet floors, private bathrooms, balconies, and sofa beds. Additional amenities include free WiFi, air-conditioning, and modern conveniences such as work desks and flat-screen TVs.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves Spanish cuisine with vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Breakfast includes warm dishes, pancakes, cheese, and fruits. Brunch and cocktails are also available.
Convenient Services: Private check-in and check-out, a tour desk, and full-day security ensure a comfortable stay.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Boatique Hotel and Marina in RÃ­o Dulce offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and balconies. Each room includes a wardrobe, work desk, and free toiletries.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy spa facilities, a sun terrace, water sports, and a swimming pool with a view. Additional amenities include a garden, open-air bath, restaurant, bar, and free WiFi.
Dining Experience: The on-site restaurant serves American, local, and Latin American cuisines, accommodating vegan and dairy-free diets. Breakfast is available in-room, and film nights enhance the stay.
Convenient Location: Located 82 km from Puerto Barrios Airport and 7 km from Castillo de San Felipe de Lara, the hostel provides easy access to local attractions.

hotels.description_it:
Boatique Hotel and Marina presenta un giardino, una sala comune, una terrazza e un ristorante a Rio Dulce. A 6,7 km da Castillo de San Felipe de Lara, l'ostello prevede un bar e attrezzature per sport acquatici. La struttura mette a disposizione servizio in camera, banco escursioni e cambio valuta per gli ospiti.

Presso questo ostello, tutte le camere includono un armadio. Presso Boatique Hotel and Marina, le camere comprendono lenzuola e asciugamani.

Aeroporto di Puerto Barrios si trova a 82 km di distanza, e la struttura offre una navetta aeroportuale a pagamento.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,5 per un viaggio a due.
